taskSummary: Move the reference-patterns route entry under src/app/[locale]/(public)/ and update every affected reference.

acceptanceCriteria: The reference-patterns route entry lives under src/app/[locale]/(public)/.
All docs, stories, tests, and reference metadata point at the new route file path.
The route still renders at /en/reference-patterns after the move.
constraints: Do not change the public URL.
Do not stop services on port 3000.

plan.summary: Move the page file into the public route group structure, then update every path reference and rerun the normal gates plus runtime verification on port 4000.

qualityGates.lastRunSummary: Passed npm run check-types, npm run lint, and npm run test after cleaning the stale .next/dev/types artifact left by the move. Runtime verification on port 4000 confirmed /en/reference-patterns still renders and shows the new (public) route path.

delivery.notes: Ready for user review. The route entry now lives under (public), references were updated, and the public URL stayed the same.
